facebook.content:
"When Jesus Christ, who is your Life, appears, you also will appear with him in glory." Colossians 3:4

Can you imagine stepping into your full destiny, not by your own strength or willpower, but by the authority of Jesus Christ? This verse reminds us that our lives are not our own, but are lived under the lordship of Jesus, with the promise of ultimate glory.

instagram.content:
"And I will give you the keys of the kingdom of heaven; and whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven, and whatever you loose on earth shall be loosed in heaven." Matthew 16:19

This means we hold authority over the kingdom. We're not waiting for permission; we're exercising it. What kingdom authority are you operating in today?

tiktok.content:
"He has put all things under his feet and has made him head over all things for the church." - Ephesians 1:22

Here's the thing: Jesus doesn't just have authority in the spiritual realm, he has authority over every area of our lives. When he's on the throne, everything else falls into place.
